expectations.text: model_created: Script creates a model with model create command
expectations.evidence: 'model create model_name = pendulum' present on line 10

expectations.text: part_created: A rigid body part is created with correct syntax (part create rigid_body name_and_position)
expectations.evidence: 'part create rigid_body name_and_position' with part_name = .pendulum.link present

expectations.text: markers_created: At least a pin marker is created on the link and ground
expectations.evidence: .pendulum.link.pin_mkr created on link and .pendulum.ground.pivot_mkr created on ground

expectations.text: revolute_joint: A revolute joint is created connecting the link to ground using i_marker_name and j_marker_name
expectations.evidence: 'constraint create joint revolute' with i_marker_name = .pendulum.link.pin_mkr and j_marker_name = .pendulum.ground.pivot_mkr

expectations.text: gravity: Gravity field is created with -Y component (e.g. -9806.65 or -9.80665)
expectations.evidence: 'y_component_gravity = -9806.65' in force create body gravitational block

expectations.text: initial_angle: Part or marker orientation set to 45 degrees for initial release
full_keyword_names: All keywords spelled out fully (not abbreviated)
expectations.evidence: All keywords fully spelled: marker_name, gravity_field_name, x_component_gravity, i_marker_name, j_marker_name, center_of_mass_marker, number_of_steps, etc.

expectations.text: dot_path_names: Object names use dot-path hierarchy .model.part.marker
no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No occurrence of 'adams_id' found in the script

expectations.text: mass_properties_uses_modify: Mass properties set with part modify (not part create) since the part already exists
expectations.evidence: 'part modify rigid_body mass_properties' used after the part is created with 'part create'

expectations.text: creates_cm_and_passes_center_of_mass_marker: A .cm marker is explicitly created on each part BEFORE part modify mass_properties is called, and center_of_mass_marker is passed in every part modify rigid_body mass_properties call
expectations.evidence: .pendulum.link.cm marker created at location 0, -100, 0 before the mass_properties modify; center_of_mass_marker = .pendulum.link.cm passed in modify call

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape (sphere, cylinder, or box) is added to each moving part
expectations.evidence: 'geometry create shape link' (rod bar) and 'geometry create shape ellipsoid' (bob) both created on .pendulum.link

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: run_adams_cmd.py exited with code 0; no lines starting with 'ERROR:' found in aview.log (2 comment lines starting with '!' containing Python traceback text are not Adams errors)
